blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 491 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
